messages.content:
Clarify the significance of the IBM X-Force ID in the context of the CVE.

IBM Emptoris Sourcing 10.1.0, 10.1.1, and 10.1.3 is vulnerable to web cache poisoning, caused by improper input validation by modifying HTTP request headers. IBM X-Force ID: 190987.
The IBM X-Force ID (190987) provides a unique identifier for tracking and accessing detailed information about this specific vulnerability within IBM's vulnerability database.
